note: Observed changes of named contact on NHS procurement notices (Find a Tender). Recorded only where every previously-seen contact at that trust stopped appearing at least 60 days before this name first appeared, AND both names are established contacts (2+ notices each, the predecessor active over 30+ days). Evidence of a changed remit, not an announced appointment, and never inferred from scan order.
source: Find a Tender (OCDS API), Open Government Licence v3
